::: {.section}
::: {.green-background}

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta acronym >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Reporting guideline acronym**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta acronym >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta relevant-urls >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Relevant URLs**
**(full-text if available)**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta relevant-urls >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta pmid-id >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**PubMed ID**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
[{{< meta pmid-id >}}](http://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pubmed/{{< meta pmid-id >}})
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

:::
<!-- background-colour -->
:::
<!-- section -->

::: {.section}

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Full bibliographic reference**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta full-bibliographic-reference >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta rg-language >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**{{< meta rg-language >}}**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
English
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta additional-languages >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Availability in additional languages**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta additional-languages >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta relevant-more >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Relevant more generic / specialised reporting guidelines**
**(i.e. main generic guideline or extension to a generic guideline)**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate} 
{{< meta relevant-more >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta website-url >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Reporting guideline website URL**
:::

::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta website-url >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Study design**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}

::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta-list study-design >}}
:::

:::
:::
<!-- row -->


::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Clinical area**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}

::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta-list clinical-specialty >}}
:::

:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Applies to the whole report or to individual sections of the report?**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta-list report-section >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta guideline-history >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Previous versions of this guideline / Guideline history**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta guideline-history >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta other >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Other**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta other >}}
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

::: {.grid data-content='{{< meta additional-information >}}'}
::: {.g-col-md-4}
**Additional Information**
:::
::: {.g-col-md-8 .notranslate}
{{< meta additional-information >}} 
:::
:::
<!-- row -->

:::
<!-- section -->
